prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In a cozy little cave beneath the coral reef, lived a shy octopus named Ollie. Ollie loved to watch the other sea creatures playing together through the wavy window of his cave, but whenever he tried to join in, his eight arms would get all tangled up and he'd quickly hide behind a nearby rock. He longed to make some friends to share his favorite things with - like playing hide-and-seek among the sea fans, or chasing after schools of sparkling fish - but every time he tried to say hello, his voice would come out in a tiny squeak and he'd quickly change color to blend in with the surrounding seaweed. Ollie wondered if he'd ever find a friend who liked him just the way he was - tentacles and all!
